result: Built task template system with 14 pre-built agency templates across 4 categories (GHL, Marketing, Sales, Operations). Backend router already existed with full template schema, seed data, getAll query, and runFromTemplate mutation. Created TaskTemplates page with grid/list view toggle, category filters, search, template detail modal showing steps/inputs/requirements, and run-from-template dialog with dynamic form generation. Route (/templates) and sidebar entry were already wired by another worker. Build passes cleanly.
